Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert F. Cohen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Enterprise Rent-A-Car Company of Sacramento.
Monica Youngquist, Risk Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Bobby Wilson.
Default was entered against defendant on August 25, 2009. Amended default was entered against defendant on December 8, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on December 8, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Enterprise Rent-A-Car Company of Sacramento, and against the Defaulted Defendant Bobby Wilson as follows:

Damages/Principal - $43,530.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $18,582.33.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $350.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $64,962.33.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
